topic: Workato vs Zapier vs n8n 2026: Enterprise Automation Platforms Compared

competitors.title: Zapier vs Make vs n8n vs Workato: Best Automation Platforms for Marketing Teams in 2026
key_points: Zapier is easiest to start with (8,000+ app library) but costs add up fast at scale
Make offers ~60% lower cost than Zapier with more power for complex workflows
n8n is best with developer resources for full control including self-hosting (free)
Workato is enterprise-only: built for IT/RevOps, not marketers or small teams
For mid-size marketing teams, Make hits best balance of power, flexibility, price in 2026

competitors.title: Zapier vs n8n vs Make vs Workato: Full Comparison
key_points: Zapier: Largest ecosystem (5,000+ apps), no-code, gets expensive at scale
n8n: Open-source, self-hostable, free with developer customization
Make (Integromat): Affordable visual automation with complex workflow capabilities
Workato: Enterprise-grade for IT teams with premium pricing
Choosing wrong platform can cost thousands in wasted investment

competitors.title: Zapier vs. Workato: Which is best? [2026]
key_points: Zapier: Implementation minutes, ~8,000+ apps, $19.99/month starting, anyone can use
Workato: Implementation weeks-months, ~1,200 apps, $1,000+/month minimum, IT teams only
Fundamental difference: Workato for IT control vs Zapier for democratized automation
Zapier AI: Copilot builds agents/chatbots from prompts; Workato AI: enterprise AI agents
Security: Both SOC 2 Type II GDPR SSO; Workato adds HIPAA for regulated industries

stats.fact: Zapier has 8,000+ app integrations vs Workato's 1,400+ and Make's 3,000+
Make offers ~60% lower cost than Zapier for equivalent workflow complexity
n8n self-hosted option is completely free - pay only for infrastructure costs
Workato pricing typically $1,000+/month minimum with custom enterprise contracts
Zapier implementation: minutes vs Workato implementation: weeks to months for complex setups
Salesforce 2026 State of Sales report: average seller spends only 40% time on revenue-generating work
n8n provides full customization with JavaScript/APIs vs Zapier's limited customization for complex workflows

Workato: Enterprise-grade iPaaS for IT-led integration
